tasks.subject: Task 1: Agent domain types (dto/agent.go)
tasks.description: Define DTOs/enums (RiskTier, AutonomyMode, AgentSessionStatus, AgentConfig+DefaultAgentConfig with APIKey json:"-", AgentToolCall, AgentStep, AgentSession). Verify: go test ./daemon/dto/ -run TestAgent -v

tasks.subject: Task 3: Anthropic provider (agent/llm/anthropic.go)
tasks.description: AnthropicProvider.Chat against Messages API, httptest. Verify: go test ./daemon/services/agent/llm/ -run Anthropic -v

tasks.subject: Task 4: Tool registry + risk tiers (agent/tools)
tasks.description: Tool/Registry/Schemas + BuildDefault (read-only reads + low-risk restart_container). Verify: go test ./daemon/services/agent/tools/ -v

tasks.subject: Task 5: Session store (agent/store.go)
tasks.description: JSON-persisted Store (Put/Get/List newest-first, Save/Load). Verify: go test ./daemon/services/agent/ -run Store -v

tasks.subject: Task 6: Agent loop + service (agent/loop.go, service.go)
tasks.description: Broadcaster iface, Service facade, bounded ReAct runLoop with tiered auto-execute + caps. Verify: go test ./daemon/services/agent/ -run Loop -v

tasks.subject: Task 7: REST + WebSocket surface (api/handlers_agent.go)
tasks.description: agentSvc field, SetAgent, BroadcastAgentEvent, 3 routes + handlers (503/400/404). Verify: go test ./daemon/services/api/ -run Agent -v

tasks.subject: Task 8: Orchestrator wiring + config loading
tasks.description: LoadConfig + BuildService (env key, provider switch), StateProvider methods on api.Server, orchestrator wiring (disabled by default). Verify: go test ./daemon/services/agent/ -run Bootstrap -v && go build ./...

tasks.subject: Task 9: Docs, CHANGELOG, CodeRabbit review, Unraid verification
tasks.description: USER-ORDERED GATE. CHANGELOG + docs/integrations/agent.md; make pre-commit-run + make test; CodeRabbit CLI review; ansible build,deploy,verify; manual curl disabled(503)+enabled(completed+answer). Verify: make pre-commit-run && make test && ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.yml ansible/deploy.yml --tags build,deploy,verify
